title: STATIONERY ISLAND Correction Tape 14Pcs, 12m x 5mm White Out Correction Tape Roller, Mouse for School and Office Supplies
features: - Perfect correction rollers: With this 14 PCS correction tape set, you have everything you need for precise corrections. Each tape is 12 meters long and 5 mm wide, ideal for flawless results every time you use it.

- High-quality PET material: Our correction tape rollers are made of robust and tear-resistant PET material, which ensures both good coverage and excellent adhesion. The tapes are odorless, safe and allow for smooth and easy application.

- Ergonomic design: Thanks to the ergonomic shape, the correction roller fits perfectly in the hand and enables precise work. The tape can be unrolled effortlessly and the integrated window function allows the ends to be easily tightened for a clean application.

- Quick corrections: The correction tapes have a protective cap on the tip that protects the tape from dust and dirt. This allows you to correct small errors quickly and efficiently without having to compromise on quality.

- Versatile use: Whether at school, in the office or at home - our correction tapes are versatile and enable precise corrections on paper without leaving residue or smudges. Trust in the quality and reliability of our correction products.
description: Product Description Stationery Island Correction Tape White Out Correction Tape. Simple operation, easy to overwrite mistakes. Special features Each tape: 12 metres long. The tape white out are not easy to break and can be used for a long time. Smooth to use, fits paper without curling edges. With an adjustable tightness window, you can adjust the tightness by rotating. Suitable size, specially designed to be easy to hold and use, fits comfortably in the hand. Our Correction Tapes widely used in student and office workers, easily overwrite mistakes, avoid messy scratches and keep the pages clean. A high-quality and practical correction tape helps you to quickly and reliably conceal spelling mistakes, avoid messy scratches and keep the pages clean.
